---
name: pr-ready
description: Use when tasks involve changed files, branch management, commit quality, PR preparation, or code review feedback handling.
---

# PR Ready

Use this skill to convert local changes into clean, reviewable PR artifacts.

## Primary behaviors
- Inspect staged/unstaged diffs and classify risks.
- Recommend commit boundaries and message quality improvements.
- Prepare reviewer-facing change summaries and test notes.
- Flag missing tests, migration steps, or rollout caveats.

## Trigger examples
- "把这波改动整理成可提 PR 的状态"
- "帮我做一次代码 review 并给出提交建议"
- "把最近改动拆成两三个清晰 commit"
